message:
refactor(agent): use matches! macro for read-only tool check

Replace map_or(false, |t| t.is_read_only()) with the more idiomatic
matches!(expr, Some(tool) if tool.is_read_only()) pattern for checking
whether a tool is read-only before batching it into the parallel
execution group. This is a pure style change — both forms produce
identical behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
